understanding.goal_understanding: Place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously to win each level and progress through the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces move via CLICK actions to target positions [x,y] if path is clear; movement is blocked by obstacles or walls; pieces toggle between two positions like [9,21] and [18,21] along a path; repeated clicks oscillate the selected piece back and forth; selection persists on one piece until changed; step budget depletes per action, ending run at 0.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously to win each level and progress through the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces move via CLICK actions to target positions [x,y] if path is clear; movement is blocked by obstacles or walls; pieces toggle between two positions like [9,21] and [18,21] along a path; repeated clicks oscillate the selected piece back and forth; selection persists on one piece until changed; step budget depletes per action, ending run at 0.
